channel.title: Data Exposure on Bhumish's Blog :tada:
channel.description: Recent content in Data Exposure on Bhumish's Blog :tada:

item.title: Never Post A Picture Of Your Boarding Pass On Social Media
item.description: Posting your boarding pass on social media may seem like a cool thing to do, but here are a ton of reasons why you shouldn’t.

item.title: Truecaller for BSNL Landline Phones
item.description: Bill Payment portal for BSNL landlines is exposing the phone-owner’s details without any verification. These quick lines explain how.
